Key features: Custom GPTs, meeting summaries, advanced data analysis
Pros: Highly versatile, integrates with almost everything, excellent reasoning

Key features: Brand voice consistency, campaign generation, SEO optimization
Pros: Maintains strict brand guidelines, creates multi-channel campaigns instantly

Pros: Native to the CRM so data is safe, excellent for scaling outreach
